---
title: "LeBar_Predictathon"
author: "Luke LeBar"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# WheatCAP Predictathon: Phenotypic Data

## Accessing T3 Breedbase

```{r}
library(BrAPI)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)

wheat <- createBrAPIConnection("wheat.triticeaetoolbox.org", is_breedbase=TRUE)

wheat$login("LukeLeBar", "Imagine2003")

wheat$get("/germplasm")
```

## Accessing Trial Metadata

```{r}
focal_trials <- c("AWY1_DVPWA_2024", "TCAP_2025_MANKS", "25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC", "OHRWW_2025_SPO", "CornellMaster_2025_McGowan", "24Crk_AY2-3","2025_AYT_Aurora","YT_Urb_25","STP1_2025_MCG")

check_val <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) return(NA)
  return(x)
}
results_list <- list()
for(trial_name in focal_trials){
  resp <- wheat$get("/studies", query=list(studyName=trial_name))
  if (length(resp$data) == 0) {
    message(paste("Skipping: No data found for", trial_name))
    next
  }
  trial_metadata <- resp$data[[1]]
  row_data <- data.frame(
    trial_name    = trial_name,
    program       = check_val(trial_metadata$trialName),
    trial_id      = check_val(trial_metadata$studyDbId),
    location      = check_val(trial_metadata$locationName),
    planting_date = check_val(trial_metadata$startDate),
    harvest_date  = check_val(trial_metadata$endDate),
    design        = check_val(trial_metadata$experimentalDesign$PUI),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  results_list[[trial_name]] <- row_data
}
focal_metadata <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
```

## CV00: Gather Program Phenotypic Data

### Grabbing all Trials for our Programs of Interest

```{r}
programs <- focal_metadata$program
all_trials <- list()
for (prog in programs) {
  resp <- wheat$get("/studies", query = list(programName = prog))
  if (length(resp$data) == 0) next
  prog_trials <- lapply(resp$data, function(x) {
    list(id = x$studyDbId, name = x$studyName, program = prog)
  })
  all_trials <- c(all_trials, prog_trials)
}
all_trials <- do.call(rbind, all_trials)
all_trials <- as.data.frame(all_trials)

all_trials <- all_trials %>% filter(name %notin% focal_metadata$trial_name)
```

### Yield Data for All Trials

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)

# 1. Setup
yield_trait <- "Grain yield - kg/ha"
master_yield_list <- list()

message(paste("Starting GET requests for", length(all_trials), "trials..."))

# 2. Loop using the list we built earlier
for (i in seq_along(all_trials)) {
  trial <- all_trials[[i]]
  
  # Print progress so you aren't in the dark
  if (i %% 5 == 0) message(paste("Processing trial", i, "of", length(all_trials)))
  
  # Use GET with a server-side filter for the trait
  resp <- tryCatch({
    wheatConn$get("/observations", query = list(
      studyDbId = trial$id,
      observationVariableName = yield_trait,
      pageSize = 1000
    ))
  }, error = function(e) return(NULL))

  # 3. Process if data exists
  # Note: BrAPI GET usually returns data in 'data' or 'combined_data' 
  # based on the specific R client version. Let's check both.
  obs <- if(!is.null(resp$combined_data)) resp$combined_data else resp$data
  
  if (length(obs) > 0) {
    # Extract using fast vectorized approach
    master_yield_list[[i]] <- tibble(
      program        = trial$program,
      study_name     = trial$name,
      studyDbId      = trial$id,
      accession_name = sapply(obs, function(x) x$germplasmName),
      yield_value    = as.numeric(sapply(obs, function(x) x$value))
    )
  }
}

# 4. Final Bind
if (length(master_yield_list) > 0) {
  final_df <- bind_rows(master_yield_list)
  message(paste("Success! Gathered", nrow(final_df), "rows of yield data."))
} else {
  message("No yield data found. Check if the trait name is exactly correct.")
}
```
